message:
Add bead task tests and verification scripts for advanced storage features

Add 43 integration test files and their corresponding verification shell scripts
covering bead-tracked work items across multiple subsystems:

Storage & indexing: Swiss tables index (bd-106dk), Bepsilon-tree write-optimized
operations (bd-3ta), database cracking (bd-nlcyx), learned index structures
(bd-1k39z), swizzle operations/benchmarks/property tests (bd-2uza4 series),
page cooling state machine (bd-2uza4.3)

Concurrency: morsel-driven dispatcher (bd-14vp7.6), vectorized vs interpreter
benchmark (bd-14vp7.7), flat combining contention (bd-u43hx), Left-Right metadata
(bd-2bg7t), RCU QSBR metadata (bd-z4mtc), seqlock config (bd-52a8k), epoch
advance tuning and EBR GC rollout (bd-2y306 series)

Analytics & privacy: provenance semirings (bd-19u.3), NitroSketch telemetry
(bd-19u.4), differential privacy (bd-19u.7), NitroSketch streaming (bd-xox.6),
NitroSketch query stats (bd-3mr81), differential privacy aggregate queries
(bd-j2cfs)

WAL & durability: parallel WAL throughput benchmark (bd-ncivz.4), crash recovery
parallel WAL (bd-ncivz.5), alien contract parallel WAL group commit (bd-ncivz.7),
self-healing durability demo (bd-2csg6.1), concurrent writer scaling (bd-2csg6.2),
proofs of retrievability (bd-368z9), LRC distributed repair (bd-3bw.6)

Materialized views: bloodstream MV push (bd-ehk.3)

Conformance & tooling: SQLite conformance dashboard (bd-t6sv2.4), query plan
concurrency hints (bd-t6sv2.6), deterministic replay debugger (bd-t6sv2.12),
multi-process coordination (bd-t6sv2.13), extension compatibility matrix
(bd-t6sv2.14), leapfrog vs hashjoin benchmark (bd-2qr3a.4)

CI & release: alien contract pack enforcement (bd-1dp9.6.6), CI E2E matrix
artifact upload gate (bd-mblr.3.2), manifest ingestion regression (bd-mblr.3.5.1.1),
operator release readiness report (bd-mblr.3.5.2), unified quality evidence
rollup (bd-mblr.3.5), perf SLO CI gate waiver lifecycle (bd-mblr.7.3.3),
selection correctness audits (bd-mblr.7.9.3)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
